title: Bitter Kenyan Mushrooms Toast
description: A post-workout dish featuring wild mushrooms' natural bitterness balanced with velvety texture on toasted bread, pescatarian-friendly.

ingredients.name: wild mushrooms (e.g., shiitake, oyster)
ingredients.notes: Fresh or frozen; use wild-harvested for authentic bitterness

ingredients.name: whole grain toast
ingredients.notes: Rye or multigrain for earthy notes

instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C for toasting bread
Sauté mushrooms in olive oil over medium heat until tender (5-7 mins)
Add milk and black pepper; simmer until thickened (2 mins)
Spread mushroom mixture on toasted bread slices
